title: prunella vulgaris subsp. hispida
intro: Prunella vulgaris subsp. hispida, also known as common self-heal or heal-all, is a subspecies of the Prunella vulgaris plant, a member of the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Prunella vulgaris subsp. hispida include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as acting as a natural antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat colds, fever, and respiratory infections.
